'''Mall'ordian''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. A popular tourist destination, it was renown for its crystalline forests. The [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] was interested in the planet for its potential resources.

{{Planet-stub}}
